历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 49318 (anomalous, suspected special type enrollment), 4895, 3531, 5662, and 1543 respectively. In 2025, Shaanxi implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time, restructuring the ranking system. The minimum ranking for the Physics Category significantly advanced to about 1543, a notable increase from the 2024 Science ranking of 5662, reflecting the impact of subject selection requirements (Physics + Chemistry) under the new exam model on ranking distribution. The enrollment plan for Southeast University in Shaanxi Physics Category: 2021: 81, 2022: 80, 2023: 79, 2024: 81, 2025: 83, 2026: 85. In 2026, there is a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.4%) compared to 2025, with a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 15th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with strong and sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates. Reputation has been generally stable in recent years; in 2021, there was a negative public opinion incident (security guards beating a dog), and in 2023, a negative incident related to teacher ethics (a college official posting inappropriate images), but no major negative records from 2024 to 2026. Douyin popularity ranks 31st overall (relatively popular), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, indicating stable application attention. It has 6 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines, and 8 A- disciplines, totaling 18 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength. Enrollment majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Architecture are highly aligned with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at Southeast University, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, are all rated as highly recommended or recommended in terms of social popularity for 2026, indicating strong application willingness. In Shaanxi Province, the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, representing a significant growth in candidate numbers and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1543, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 students (+2.4%) in 2026, an increase of about 19.7% in Physics Category candidates, and the sustained appeal of the university's top-tier status and advantageous disciplines, it is judged that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The significant increase in candidates is the most critical factor driving the ranking decline, with the expansion only partially alleviating competitive pressure. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1600, with a range of 1418-1782.

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)

- Future Robotics (Future Technology Class)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1600, range 1418-1782. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<1418), prioritize reaching for top-tier programs like Wu Jianxiong Class and Computer Science. For rankings near the upper bound (>1782), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 programs, while also considering lower-ranking programs in Tier 2. Southeast University has numerous A+ disciplines, and each tier of programs is supported by top-tier disciplines, offering high application value.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Southeast University's medical category in Shaanxi Province from 2022 to 2025 were 5639 (plan 8), 4030 (plan 8), 4391 (plan 10), and 7774 (plan 23) respectively. In 2025, the plan expanded from 10 to 23 (+130%), causing the ranking to drop significantly from 4391 to 7774. In 2026, the plan continues to expand to 25 (+8.7%), with a notably narrowed expansion rate. In 2026, a new Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training) major (5 spots) is added, bringing the total medical plan to 25, including Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging) 10 spots, Preventive Medicine 10 spots, and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) 5 spots. The narrowing expansion rate combined with the addition of a high-demand major is expected to cause the ranking to rise somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected for the national Double First-Class construction, located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province. As a top comprehensive university in China, its medical disciplines have developed rapidly relying on engineering advantages, enjoying high recognition among candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with Clinical Medicine categories particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the new Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training) major, one of the hottest directions in medicine, will attract more high-quality students. The enrollment scale for medical categories in Shaanxi Province is relatively limited. Southeast University's medical category plan in Shaanxi increases from 23 to 25, but the addition of a high-demand major will have an upward pulling effect on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and trend correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Southeast University's medical category in Shaanxi Province in 2026 is approximately 7980, with a fluctuation range of 7740-8220. Compared to the 2025 ranking of 7774, the ranking rises slightly (number decreases), reflecting the narrowing expansion rate and increased competition due to the new 5+3 integrated major.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
- Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Clinical Medicine Category as the main direction, Preventive Medicine as a safe choice, and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) as a stretch goal.
